title: Fly Zapper Electric Indoor, 3500V High-Voltage Insect Killer with 20W UV Light (365nm), Powerful Mosquito & Fly Zapper with Washable Tray & Hanging Chain, Safe Quiet Operation, UK Plug
bullet_points: [High-Voltage Grid] Powered by a true 3500V electric killing grid, this bug zapper delivers instant and reliable elimination of mosquitoes, flies, moths, and other flying insects on contact. The high-voltage design ensures efficient performance as a powerful electric fly zapper for everyday indoor use.

[UV Light Spectrum] Features 20W UV lamps emitting light in the 365–395nm range—the spectrum most attractive to flying pests. This targeted illumination makes the unit an effective mosquito zapper and fly zapper, drawing insects in consistently from across the room.

[Easy to Clean] Designed for hassle-free maintenance with a fully removable, non-spill insect collection tray. Simply unplug the unit, slide out the tray, empty or rinse it under the tap, and slide it back in.

[2-in-1 Placement] Use it freestanding on countertops, shelves, dining tables or sideboards—or hang it from walls, ceilings or hooks using the included metal chain. Ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, home offices, conservatories, greenhouses, and even small cafés or B&Bs. This flexible setup ensures optimal positioning and effective coverage of up to 160m².

[Prevents Accidental Touch] Fully enclosed with a tightly woven, fine-mesh safety guard that completely surrounds the high-voltage grid, making it impossible for fingers—especially children’s—or curious pets to reach the electrified components. You get powerful pest control without compromising on household safety, even during overnight or unsupervised use.
[Quick fix] In rare cases, bulbs can shift during shipping. Just rotate them firmly into place and plug in.
